creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Looking ahead, from <https://reviews.freebsd.org/D39384#896487>: 

> … Re-reading the MFC section, it needs to be updated based on the 
> last 18-24 months of what we've actually done with MFCs

----

Triage: 

* clear the maintainer-feedback flag that lacks an addressee

* 5.3.10 no longer exists, so edit the URL field

* the closest anchor below 5.4 (currently 'Vendor Imports with Git') is 
  <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/committers-guide/#_trim_metadata>.
